title: RadQA: Radiology Report Question Answering
description: Extractive question answering on radiology reports. Annotators read clinical radiology reports and highlight answer spans that address given clinical questions, classify answerability, and identify the type of information conveyed by the answer. Based on the RadQA dataset for improving comprehension of radiology reports.
paperReference: Soni et al., ACL BioNLP Workshop 2022
citation:
